title: Combat Damage Tuning
description: Divisors, caps, and curve constants for the damage formula (Sim.Match.DamageCalculator). The formula SHAPE is adopted from DDTank's MakeDamage (guard/defence multiplicative DR, attack scaling, distance falloff) per ADR-0005; these divisors are externalized here rather than hardcoded in C#. They are first-pass values mirroring DDTank's own constants and will be re-tuned once the equipment/stat system (#4) sets Vektram's stat scales. The C# fallback Sim.Content.CombatTuning.Default mirrors this file and is pinned to it by a test. DELIBERATELY NOT REPLICATED from DDTank: integer truncation of final damage, per-room formula-shape switching (a scalar mode multiplier is used instead and rooms (#5) will supply it), and client-trusted rolls (all crit/miss rolls are server-side seeded SimRandom).

guardReduceCap.description: Maximum fraction guard reduction can reach (DDTank 0.60).

defenceReduceCap.description: Maximum fraction defence reduction can reach (DDTank 0.90).

falloffStrength.description: Blast distance falloff: factor = 1 - falloffStrength * (distance/radius). DDTank used 0.25 (forgiving blasts, max 25% reduction at the edge).

baseDamageBonusDivisor.description: Self-scaling term: (1 + BaseDamage / baseDamageBonusDivisor) (DDTank 10000). Set very large to disable.
